promptComposer.title: Start with an idea
promptComposer.description: Describe what you want. We suggest only options that already exist in Studio.
promptComposer.placeholder: Example: a fashion model in a cafe wearing a dress, commercial portrait
promptComposer.error.short: Write a little more detail before creating a proposal.
promptComposer.review.title: Review the supported selections
promptComposer.review.mapped: Only existing Studio options were mapped. You can review them before using the result.
promptComposer.review.unmapped: No official options were assumed. Your idea remains available as a freeform prompt.
